title: Things to do in Chengdu — itinerary + meal log
html:
Things to do in Chengdu — itinerary + meal log

Source: 2024-09-25 Apple Note. Pre-trip planning + meal-by-meal cost log from chengdu visit during the china chapter.

TL;DR

  • chengdu sightseeing list: mt qing cheng, sichuan opera at Shufeng Yayun Teahouse / Jinjiang Theater, qing yang palace taoism temple fair, Jin Li ancient street festival (lantern displays), Chunxi Road / Jinjiang River area
  • Food obsession: sichuan food highlighted with "time to grub" emphasis
  • Cost-tracked meal log (in CNY): 7 meals + snacks totaling 362 CNY ($50 USD) over the trip
  • Itinerary: train in, fly back

Pattern observed

Yahir's travel notes consistently mix what to see with what each meal cost — an early founder's instinct for treating life as a P&L. Aligns with the no runway discipline pattern that hardens later in 2025.

Cost log breakdown

Meal CNY
1st meal 72
2nd meal 16
Pastries 5
Mixue ice cream cone 2
3rd meal 34
Magnum bar 10
Bev 5
4th meal 68
5th frog meal 97
Blizzard 28
Water 5
Mixue pineapple 8
Pre-panda breakfast 8.5

The "5th frog meal" at 97 CNY is the standout — Sichuan style frog is a Chengdu specialty.

Open questions

  • Did the Mt Qing Cheng + opera + temple all get done, or was this aspirational?
  • "Pre-panda breakfast" — visited a panda research base?

Related

  • chengdu
  • china chapter
  • sichuan food
